items.name: ColorPick Eyedropper
items.desc: A zoomed eyedropper & color chooser tool that allows you to select color values from webpages and more.

items.name: Video Speed Controller
items.desc: Speed up, slow down, advance and rewind HTML5 audio/video with shortcuts.

items.name: Volume Master
items.desc: Up to 600% volume boost. Boost volume for each tab separately.

items.name: React Developer Tools
items.desc: Inspect React component hierarchies, state, hooks, and performance profiles inside Chrome DevTools.

items.name: Redux DevTools
items.desc: DevTools for Redux supporting hot reloading, state diff logging, and time travel debugging.

items.name: Vue.js devtools
items.desc: Chrome DevTools extension for debugging Vue.js applications, components, events, and Vuex states.

items.name: Angular DevTools
items.desc: Debug Angular applications with visualization of component structure, change detection profiling, and state tracking.

items.name: Svelte DevTools
items.desc: Inspect Svelte component state, hierarchy, and events directly in your developer panel.

items.name: JSON Viewer
items.desc: Customizable Chrome extension for formatting, styling, and searching raw JSON files directly in browser tabs.

items.name: JSONView
items.desc: Formats and syntax highlights JSON documents with collapsible tree structures, clickable URLs, and raw formats.

items.name: GraphQL Network Inspector
items.desc: View and debug GraphQL requests directly in DevTools.

items.name: Wappalyzer
items.desc: Uncover the technology stacks behind any website, including CMSs, frameworks, analytics tools, and databases.

items.name: BuiltWith Technology Profiler
items.desc: Find out what technologies a website is built with, including widgets, analytics, hosting, and mail frameworks.

items.name: axe DevTools
items.desc: Fast, lightweight accessibility testing tool to identify and resolve critical accessibility errors in your HTML.

items.name: WAVE Evaluation Tool
items.desc: Web accessibility evaluation tool that injects visual indicators onto the webpage to help diagnose WCAG errors.

items.name: CSS Peeper
items.desc: A smart CSS inspector tailored for web designers. Extract nested styles, colors, layouts, and image assets in one click.

items.name: Web Developer
items.desc: Adds a complete utility toolbar to inspect styles, toggle CSS, disable scripts, edit cookies, and check accessibility.

items.name: Open in VS Code
items.desc: Open GitHub repositories directly in VS Code with one click.

items.name: VisBug
items.desc: Open-source web design debug tools built with web components. Inspect elements, align spacing, and edit text visually.

items.name: Requestly
items.desc: Redirect URLs, modify headers, cancel requests, insert custom scripts, and mock API responses on the fly.

items.name: ModHeader
items.desc: Modify request headers, response headers, and redirect requests to test custom authorization tokens and testing states.

items.name: Ember Inspector
items.desc: Inspect Ember.js applications, routes, controllers, active models, promises, and data layer performance.

items.name: PHP Console
items.desc: Handle PHP errors, dumps, and debugging queries directly in your browser console via headers payload.

items.name: XPath Helper
items.desc: Extract, edit, and evaluate XPath queries live on any web page by holding Shift and hovering over elements.

items.name: SEOquake
items.desc: Free SEO toolkit showing on-page metrics, keyword density, link analysis, and SERP overlays for any webpage.

items.name: Detailed SEO Extension
items.desc: Get instant SEO insights for any page, including title tags, meta descriptions, headings, and robots directives.

items.name: Octotree
items.desc: Enhance GitHub with an interactive code tree sidebar. Easily browse repository files, commits, and pull requests.

items.name: Refined GitHub
items.desc: Simplifies and streamlines the GitHub interface, adding dozens of productivity tweaks, hotkeys, and shortcuts.

items.name: OctoLinker
items.desc: Links dependency code blocks (like require, import, package.json dependencies) directly to their respective source sites.

items.name: daily.dev
items.desc: The ultimate developer homepage. Curates a personalized tech news feed from top engineering communities.

items.name: Clockify Time Tracker
items.desc: Track coding hours, timesheets, and project tasks directly from Chrome. Integrates with GitHub, Jira, and Gitlab.

items.name: Toggl Track
items.desc: Simple productivity timer inside web tools. Tracks screen time and syncs entries directly to Toggl.

items.name: Lighthouse
items.desc: Automated open-source tool for auditing performance, accessibility, SEO, and best practices of web apps.

items.name: Clear Cache
items.desc: Clear your browser cache, storage, cookies, and local database instantly with a single button or shortcut key.

items.name: EditThisCookie
items.desc: Full-featured cookie manager. Edit, add, delete, search, block, and export cookies in a simple visual popup.

items.name: OneTab
items.desc: Save up to 95% memory and reduce tab clutter by converting all of your active tabs into a clean list layout.

items.name: Tab Wrangler
items.desc: Automatically closes inactive tabs after a configured time delay, keeping tab lists tidy and conserving system resources.

items.name: Grammarly
items.desc: Provides real-time feedback on writing clarity, grammar, tone, and spelling across all web editors and input boxes.

items.name: Stylus
items.desc: Redesign your favorite websites by installing and customizing custom CSS stylesheets locally.

items.name: Ghostery
items.desc: Clean up webpages, block analytics trackers, block ads, and inspect trackers to speed up load times.

items.name: Speedtest by Ookla
items.desc: Measure your internet connection speeds, latency, and ping metrics directly from a quick Chrome popup.

items.name: Dark Reader
items.desc: Applies a customizable dark mode to websites for more comfortable browsing & Productivity.

items.name: Bitwarden
items.desc: Secure password manager that stores, generates, and autofills passwords.

items.name: LanguageTool
items.desc: Checks grammar, spelling, punctuation, and writing style in real time.

items.name: SponsorBlock
items.desc: Automatically skips sponsored segments and other unwanted parts of YouTube videos.

items.name: Tampermonkey
items.desc: Runs custom userscripts to automate tasks and customize websites.

items.name: Session Buddy
items.desc: Saves and restores browser sessions to recover tabs after crashes or restarts.

items.name: JSON Formatter
items.desc: Formats and highlights JSON data for easier reading and debugging.

items.name: Todoist for Chrome
items.desc: Add tasks and save web pages to Todoist as you browse, right-click to capture text, and plan your day from the toolbar.

items.name: Loom
items.desc: Record your screen and camera with one click and instantly share the video with a link.

items.name: BlockSite
items.desc: Block distracting websites and apps, schedule focus sessions, and password-protect your blocklist to stay on task.

items.name: 1Password
items.desc: Sign in to sites, generate strong passwords, and autofill saved logins, passkeys, and cards from your vault.

items.name: Notion Web Clipper
items.desc: Save any page on the web straight into a Notion database or page with a single click.

items.name: AutoPagerize
items.desc: Automatically loads the next page while scrolling.

items.name: ColorZilla
items.desc: Advanced eyedropper, page color analyzer, color picker, palette generator, and CSS gradient builder.

items.name: Site Palette
items.desc: Extract and generate beautiful, shareable color palettes from any website layout dynamically.

items.name: SVG Export
items.desc: Search, preview, copy code, or download SVGs from web pages in bulk. Converts icons to PNG/JPEG formats.

items.name: PerfectPixel
items.desc: Overlay design mockup images on top of developed HTML to verify alignments and ensure pixel-perfect matches.

items.name: Image Downloader
items.desc: Download all images from a webpage with filtering options.

items.name: Page Ruler Redux
items.desc: Measure pixel dimensions and spacing on webpages.

items.name: Mobile Simulator
items.desc: Test responsive designs using mock smartphone, tablet, and smart TV viewpoints with screen touch gestures.

items.name: Window Resizer
items.desc: Resize your browser window to simulate specific viewport resolutions, including mobile, laptop, and tablet widths.

items.name: Dimensions
items.desc: A tool for designers to measure screen dimensions, margins, paddings, and relative pixel distances on mouse movements.

items.name: Grid Ruler
items.desc: Draw layout guidelines, align columns, measure absolute margins, and set grids directly over top of web pages.

items.name: WhatFont
items.desc: Identify web typography instantly. Hover over text to inspect font families, sizes, line heights, and weights.

items.name: Fonts Ninja
items.desc: Inspect typography on any page. View font names, css values, weights, and try fonts inside the visual dashboard.

items.name: User-Agent Switcher
items.desc: Mock your browser's user-agent headers to test mobile websites, specific browser render views, and user-agent scripts.

items.name: Check My Links
items.desc: A link checker that crawls web pages and lists status codes, highlighting working (200) and broken (404) links.

items.name: WhatRuns
items.desc: One-click widget showing web application technology stacks, tracking scripts, webservers, and analytics platforms.

items.name: Wapiti Mobile Simulator
items.desc: Interactive viewport resize and simulation of mock environments to test responsive web layouts easily.

items.name: Eye Dropper
items.desc: Pick colors from any webpage with a built-in color picker, then copy codes as HEX, RGB, or HSL.

items.name: GoFullPage
items.desc: Capture a full-page screenshot in one click, then crop, annotate, and export it as an image or PDF.

items.name: Fireshot
items.desc: Capture, annotate, and export full webpage screenshots.

items.name: Momentum
items.desc: Replace new tab page with a personal dashboard featuring to-do, weather, inspiration, and focus prompts.

items.name: Custom Cursor for Chrome
items.desc: Customize your browser cursor with a massive collection of fun, creative, and cute custom cursors.

items.name: GIPHY for Chrome
items.desc: Search and drag-and-drop GIFs and stickers into emails, Slack, social media posts, and repositories instantly.

items.name: Isometric Contributions
items.desc: Toggles your 2D GitHub contribution graph into a 3D isometric building block view.

items.name: Panic Button
items.desc: Hide all of your active browser tabs at once with a single click or keyboard shortcut, and restore them later.

items.name: Tabby Cat

items.name: New Tab Redirect
items.desc: Replace the default new tab page with a custom URL, local file, or one of Chrome's built-in pages.

items.name: uBlock Origin
items.desc: Blocks ads, trackers, malware, and unwanted content for faster and safer browsing.

items.name: Privacy Badger
items.desc: Automatically detects and blocks invisible trackers while you browse.

items.name: Cookie-Editor

items.name: LocalCDN
items.desc: Serves popular web libraries locally to improve privacy and reduce external requests.

items.name: Decentraleyes
items.desc: Emulates popular CDNs locally to reduce requests to third-party servers.

items.name: ClearURLs
items.desc: Removes tracking parameters from URLs before they are opened or shared.

items.name: I still don't care about cookies
items.desc: Automatically hides or accepts cookie consent banners on supported websites.

items.name: CanvasBlocker

items.name: NoScript
items.desc: Provides advanced control over JavaScript, WebGL, and other active web content.
